# NQB Passive Fire Protection

> UK subcontractor specialising in passive fire protection: fire doors and fire compartmentation for residential, commercial and public sector projects. Full supply and installation service.

## Services
- Fire barriers: Stonewall, Firefly, Rockwool
- Fire penetration seals: intumescent mastics, pipe wraps & collars, coated fire batt, structural compound, compression seals
- Fire rated ductwork: mineral fibre site-fabricated boards, Promat composite boards, Fermasteel panels
- Intumescent paint: solvent based and water based
- Fire doors: installation and maintenance

## Key clients
Persimmon Homes, Lambeth Council, Guinness Partnership, Harlow Council, Morgan Sindall

## Track record
Penetration sealing and riser compartmentation across occupied residential blocks; soffit replacement achieving Class 0 spread of flame; loft compartmentation with Firefly cavity barriers.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.nqbfireprotection.co.uk/
- Email: info@nqbpassivefire.co.uk
